category_sources: source_facts.description says dbhash computes SQLite database schema/content hashes; sqlite.org/dbhash.html documents it as a command-line utility for SQLite database files.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is dbhash; sqlite.org/dbhash.html titles the tool as the dbhash utility program.
docs_sources: Official SQLite dbhash page documents overview, usage, and building.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; sqlite.org source repository is the canonical SQLite Fossil repository containing dbhash.c.
tags_sources: source_facts.executables lists dbhash; source_facts.description and sqlite.org/dbhash.html identify SQLite database hashing behavior.
